title: guards: treat compounding-complete as a terminal phase in the intake gate
action: In checkWrite, replace the phase === 'idle' branch with a TERMINAL_PHASES set {idle, compounding-complete} so a closed feature no longer leaves the repo default-open; update the deny message; add coverage in test_lib.mjs and test_bee_write_guard_hook.mjs; sync .bee/bin/lib/guards.mjs byte-identical.
must_haves: checkWrite denies source writes when phase is compounding-complete, same as idle
docs/ .bee/ plans/ AGENTS.md still writable in that phase
idle_gate:false config disables it for both terminal phases

trace.verification_evidence: 223 passed, 0 failed (test_lib) + 21 passed, 0 failed (write-guard hook, incl. 2 new terminal-phase cases) + onboard suite 0 failures. Live check: checkWrite at phase=compounding-complete with all gates still approved now denies assets/css/tasks.css (kind: intake) and still allows docs/ and .bee/.
